PurchaseReservedInstance.relatedRenewFlag: Flag for associated renewal of the instance, defaults to empty string. Note: CDS disks associated with the instance will be renewed together.
PurchaseReservedInstance.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method, including Prepaid, Postpaid, and bidding (spot instance) (for create instance, create spot instance, and instance renewal)
PurchaseReservedInstance.billing.reservation: Reservation info, not required for Postpaid, required for Prepaid (for create instance, create spot instance, and instance renewal)
PurchaseReservedInstance.cdsCustomPeriod: Custom renewal period for attached disks, optional value greater than or equal to (BCC expiration time after renewal - CDS current expiration time), range: [1, 60] months. If not specified, defaults to match BCC expiration time after renewal.
PurchaseReservedInstance.cdsCustomPeriod.period: Renewal duration in months, range: [1, 60]. The disk expiration time after renewal must be equal to or later than the BCC expiration time, otherwise renewal fails. (Instance renewal)
PurchaseReservedInstance.cdsCustomPeriod.volumeId: Disk ID (returned by disk details and disk list APIs, instance renewal)
